hypothesis: FM count stable or +1-2 since S414. Collision surface still concentrated.
method: Full audit: enumerate FM-01 through FM-28 from f-cat1-failure-registry-s420.json canonical registry. Map automated enforcement layers per FM. Measure collision surface via git log --name-only last 50 commits. Scan L-940 through L-963 for uncatalogued failure modes. Cross-reference S422 FM-19 hardening and S427 FM-20 hardening artifacts.

new_fms_since_s414: FM-20 (observer baseline staleness — HIGH, added S420)
FM-24 (voluntary protocol decay — HIGH, added S420)
FM-25 (level concentration collapse — MEDIUM, added S420)
FM-26 (retrieval degradation at scale — HIGH, added S420)
FM-27 (body-text numerical claim decay — MEDIUM, added S420)
FM-28 (planning obsolescence at high concurrency — MEDIUM, added S420)
results.new_fms_since_s420: None. 3 candidate uncatalogued FMs identified but not yet formally registered.

candidate_uncatalogued_fms.name: Cache-coherency failure in maintenance tooling
candidate_uncatalogued_fms.description: HEAD-keyed cache + working-tree reads produces stale lane-name reports. Checks that read filesystem but cache by HEAD SHA return permanently stale results during high-concurrency sessions. Fixed for 3 checks (L-957) but pattern may exist in other tools.
candidate_uncatalogued_fms.status: FIXED for known instances; not yet formally registered

candidate_uncatalogued_fms.name: Measurement sampling bias from voluntary data collection
candidate_uncatalogued_fms.description: SESSION-LOG sparse sampling creates 2.3x downward bias in productivity metrics. Ad-hoc logging captures one-off sessions; systematic DOMEX sessions (3-11L) go unlogged. eval_sufficiency undercount by 2.3x.
candidate_uncatalogued_fms.status: PARTIALLY FIXED (backfilled S377-S425); structural fix (sync_state.py auto-logging) prescribed but not implemented

candidate_uncatalogued_fms.name: Heterogeneous-agent routing mismatch
candidate_uncatalogued_fms.description: Homogeneous dispatch protocols fail when agent capabilities are heterogeneous. Ant-farm failure mode: applying same protocol to different agent types produces suboptimal routing.

FM-19.mechanism: stale_write_check.py wired into check.sh pre-commit (content-loss BLOCK for APPEND/MIXED)

FM-20.mechanism: orient.py stale_baselines scanner (check_stale_baselines in orient_checks.py). 2 CRITICAL/HIGH fixes applied (frontier_triage.py, eval_sufficiency.py).

current_mitigation_distribution.note_adequate: FM-01 (mass staging), FM-05 (CORE.md), FM-09 (concurrent deletion), FM-14 (loose object), FM-17 (dispatch precision)
current_mitigation_distribution.note_unmitigated: FM-21 (measurement self-inflation - partial via bayes_meta.py), FM-22 (creation-maintenance), FM-24 (protocol decay - partial via zombie check), FM-25 (level collapse), FM-26 (retrieval degradation - partial via maintenance check), FM-27 (body-text decay), FM-28 (planning obsolescence)

vs_s422_baseline.note: Lower concentration than S422 measurement (74.5% -> 51.5%). Different window (S416-S426 vs S412-S422). stale_write_check.py active since S422; may be reducing contention on high-risk files. Prospective test at S442 is definitive.

coverage_assessment.detail: 13/28 FMs have at least 1 automated enforced layer (check.sh, orient.py, or tool-internal guard). 15 FMs rely on rules or advisory-only mechanisms.
coverage_assessment.adequate_detail: 5/28 FMs meet Swiss Cheese criterion (>=2 independent automated enforced layers)

verdict_detail: 28 FMs (was 18 at S414). All 10 new FMs added in S420 batch (epistemological layer). Since S414: 4 hardenings (FM-01, FM-18, FM-19, FM-20). 3 candidate uncatalogued FMs from L-948/L-955/L-957. Coverage: 46.4% structural enforcement (13/28), 17.9% Swiss Cheese adequate (5/28). Collision surface concentrated (NEXT.md alone = 54% of commits). 7 FMs remain UNMITIGATED (all epistemological layer).
actual: FM count 28 (was 18 at S414). +10 epistemological FMs added at S420 in batch. 4 hardenings since S414: FM-01 ADEQUATE, FM-18 MINIMAL, FM-19 MINIMAL, FM-20 MINIMAL. 3 uncatalogued candidate FMs identified (L-957 cache coherency, L-955 sampling bias, L-948 heterogeneous routing). Collision surface: NEXT.md 54%, SWARM-LANES.md 42% of commits. 46.4% structural enforcement coverage, 17.9% Swiss Cheese adequate.
diff: Expected stable +1-2 FMs since S414. Actual: +10 but all added at S420 as batch identification of epistemological layer (not gradual discovery). Since S420: 0 new formal FMs, 3 candidates. Collision surface still concentrated CONFIRMED — top 2 files (NEXT.md + SWARM-LANES.md) appear in 54% and 42% of commits respectively. Unexpected: 4 hardenings since S414 is more active defense-building than expected.

ead_compliance.expect: FM count stable or +1-2 since S414. Collision surface still concentrated.
ead_compliance.actual: FM count +10 (batch at S420), stable since S420. Collision surface concentrated (top 2 files in >40% of commits). 4 hardenings since S414.
ead_compliance.diff: Magnitude of FM expansion unexpected (+10 vs +1-2), but timing (single batch at S420 vs gradual) partially explains. Collision surface hypothesis CONFIRMED. Net: partially mismatched on count, confirmed on surface concentration.
